[notes]
Loopback doesn't eval predicate at start of alt

[type]
Parser

[grammar]
grammar T;
file_
@after {print($ctx.toStringTree(recog=self), file=self._output)}
  : para para EOF ;
para: paraContent NL NL ;
paraContent : ('s'|'x'|{self._input.LA(2)!=TParser.NL}? NL)+ ;
NL : '\n' ;
s : 's' ;
X : 'x' ;

[start]
file_

[input]
"""s


x

"""

[output]
"""(file_ (para (paraContent s) \n \n) (para (paraContent \n x) \n \n) <EOF>)
"""
